stocks.name: Zenith Bank
stocks.notes: FY2025 audited released April 7, 2026. Total div = ₦1.25 interim + ₦8.75 final proposed. BVPS derived from FY2025 PAT (₦1.04T) and ROAE (23.2%); refine when audited balance sheet PDF is parsed. AVD is afx.kwayisi.org 3-month figure used as a 30d proxy.

stocks.name: GTCO
stocks.notes: FY2025 audited released April 1, 2026. Total div = ₦1.00 interim + ₦11.76 final. BVPS from reported shareholders' funds (₦3.4T) ÷ shares (36.55B). AVD is 3-month proxy.

stocks.name: Access Holdings
stocks.notes: FY2025 audited results approved by board Feb 20, 2026, awaiting CBN clearance — not yet public. Fundamentals from 9M 2025 financials. EPS TTM (12.01) and DPS TTM (2.05 — single FY2024 final paid Apr 30 2025) from stockanalysis.com. Shares (50.36B) per stockanalysis financials, which pulls from the actual filing — afx.kwayisi.org's 54.4B figure was ~8% high, possibly lagged or includes treasury. BVPS = total equity Sept 30 (₦3.98T) ÷ 50.36B = ₦78.96. AVD = afx.kwayisi.org's 3-month avg value (₦1.57B); my prior figure (₦2.45B) wrongly multiplied ADV × current price.

stocks.name: UBA
stocks.notes: FY2025 audited results pending CBN clearance. EPS TTM estimated as Q4 2024 (₦3.55) + 9M 2025 (₦13.56) = ₦17.11. DPS TTM = FY2024 final (₦3.00) + H1 2025 interim (₦0.25). BVPS rough estimate from ROAE backing into equity; refine when FY2025 published.

stocks.name: FBN Holdings
stocks.notes: Rebrand: NGX ticker is now FIRSTHOLDCO (chart_symbol field carries this for chart deeplinks). FY2025 EPS collapsed (₦18.59 → ₦0.91) due to ₦748B impairment charge. Major capital raise (1-for-6 rights + private placement) completed in 2025 — share count and equity both grew materially. BVPS estimated; flag for verification against audited balance sheet.
